feed.title: Lumi Studio — independent iOS app guides
feed.subtitle: A six-hour high-intent rotation across every live Lumi Studio app.

entry.title: Lumi Mission Planet — independent iOS app guide

link.title: Lumi Mission Planet on the App Store

entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: Lumi Mission Planet. Turn chores and daily routines into clear, kid-friendly missions. Read the guide and see if it fits. #KidsRoutines #Parenting #iOSApps
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6779750237
entry.summary: Today's Lumi Studio app guide: Lumi Mission Planet. Turn chores and daily routines into clear, kid-friendly missions. Read the guide and see if it fits. #KidsRoutines #Parenting #iOSApps App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6779750237

entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: LockHour Pro. Block distracting apps and plan focused sessions when Screen Time is not enough. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Focus #DigitalWellbeing #iOSApps

entry.title: G+Money — independent iOS app guide
entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: G+Money. Track expenses and convert currencies in a simple offline budgeting flow. Read the guide and see if it fits. #Budgeting #TravelFinance #iOSApps
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755782939

entry.title: DailyMate — independent iOS app guide
entry.content:
Today's Lumi Studio app guide: DailyMate. Practice complete phrases for real conversations instead of isolated vocabulary. Read the guide and see if it fits. #LanguageLearning #TravelLanguage #iOSApps
App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6790418321
